calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-26-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:15am
Cause called for Small Claims appeal, Judge Pro Tem Roger Rubin, nothing on record. Clerk-Beth Wilber, Dept. 525. Appellant, Zhong Liu, appears in Pro Per; Respondent, Megan Hanley, appears in Pro Per. Philip Wong appears with Ms. Liu to informally translate Cantonese into English. Parties previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Rubin.
9:35am
Case submitted. No new evidence identified or retained.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-17-2009 Denied

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-22-2009 Judgment Entered
